---
title: "Ellen Barlee"
---

## Ellen Barlee

**Dates:** (b. 1825/6)

### Description

social worker

### Biography

Third of the five daughters of the Rev. Edward Barlee, Rector of Worlingworth, Suffolk, she was Lady superintendent of the Institution for the Employment of Needlewomen, Hinde St, founded 1860, as well as a contributor to the <i>Athenaeum</i>, the <i>Englishwoman's Journal</i> and <i>MP</i> (1866), referred to 3 April 1863. [1851, 1861 census]

### Letters

- Letter from May 5th 1888
- Letter from April 3d 1862

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
